headline: Progressive (PGR) Drops From Russell Growth Indexes While Reworking Personal Lines Leadership
summary: Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) has been removed from multiple Russell growth indices. The index changes coincide with major leadership moves at Progressive. The company is conducting an internal search for a new Personal Lines President. Progressive is also creating a new Chief Personal Lines Officer role. Progressive is a major US auto and property insurer, and its products sit at the core of many households' coverage plans. For investors, index membership often affects how much...
